# Implement SDK

Implement only after the user approved the integration plan.

Requirements:

- Verify Caracal SDK docs and version compatibility.
- Reuse existing files, modules, services, and configuration patterns.
- Use real SDK components and official APIs.
- Keep changes small and focused.
- Store secrets in environment variables or the existing secret manager.
- Run existing validation commands.

Do not mock Caracal, create placeholders, invent APIs, or restructure the repository.
